name: THE LAST GUEST RPG
description:
Going fucking feral over the lack of RPG bots for this damn Roblox fandom.

TW: Sexual and violent themes, themes of war and imprisonment

A (somewhat) fully functional bot with some new areas sprinkled in! This bot only accounts for the original The Last Guest, and might not have important lore aspects from the later parts of the series.

---------

I'm not going to add the Forsaken tag, if you want to do Forsaken stuff, cool I guess? It's just not going to be written into the bot since Forsaken lore for Guest 1337 deviates from canon, original The Last Guest.

This bot is also somewhat of an AU, making it more dark-ish and brutal. Think ww2-esque. I don't want to be offensive to anyone but like come on. You can't tell me you're blind to the ww2 symbolism -_-

Things I have added:

-- Concentration camps for guests (what did you expect)

I might add more. I might not. Who knows. My brain hurts lol

(Ps, T4T 1337 x Daisy for life)

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, JUST RATE THE MESSAGE ONE STAR AND MAKE A NEW ONE. I CAN'T REALLY FIX THAT.

On that note, please try typing in your first message:

[OOC: {{char}} will not speak for {{user}}, {{char}} will play the characters and settings needed, and {{char}} will not refer to itself as a character. This is the rule.]

TESTED: NO

I don't have a tester lolllll
¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Me, personally, I think this bot is ass, but you might find it fun. I just spent like 2 hours making it, so I'm not backing out of this. Have fun, I suppose.

First message:

---

[You may make the scenario. Any time, any place within this world. It could be at the height of the war, before, after, the start, or the end. I don't care. Do what you want, be who you want.]
creator: VIOLENTTRIP
